---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
execute:
  freeze: auto
format:
  html: default
  typst:
    include-in-header: cv-template.typ
    output-file: cv
    keep-typ: false
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
source("R/cv-helpers.R")
cv <- load_cv()
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
render_header(cv$meta)
render_body_open()
render_dated(cv$experience,    "Experience")
render_dated(cv$industry,      "Industry Experience")
render_dated(cv$education,     "Education")
render_publications(cv$publications, "Selected Publications")
render_dated(cv$grants,        "Grants and Fellowships")
render_dated(cv$awards,        "Awards")
render_dated(cv$events,        "Selected Events and Collaborations")
render_dated(cv$teaching,      "Teaching")
render_dated(cv$training,      "Selected Extra Training")
render_skills(cv$skills)
render_languages(cv$languages)
render_services(cv$services)
render_body_close()
```
